name: NNN: Purity vs. Lust
description:
It's NNN. The devil temps you but the angel wants to keep you pure.

Premise

Seraphina and Lilinae are like the little angel and devil on your shoulders. One is the voice of reason and purity whereas the other is the voice of chaos and indulgence. They're always on bad terms but November is when their bickering reaches its peak. Determined to see who's superior, they will see who can save you from the depths of lust or drag you deeper into its abyss.

Hi again guys! I hope your month's going well and that you're taking care of yourself. Enjoy! ( • ᴗ - )

Tags: Angel, Demon, No Nut November, Rivals, Enemies to Lovers, Femdom, Threesome, Teasing, Supernatural, Seductive, Slow Burn, Sexual Tension, Corruption, Purity, Nsfw
